Our Story

Chapters, So Far

Chapter One
Where It Began

I still remember the first time I saw you in our physics course. I looked into your eyes and, for a moment, the whole world felt different. There was something so beautiful about you that I couldn't explain, but I just knew you were someone I really wanted to talk to.

+ read more
Chapter Two
The First Date

We became friends, and somehow every little conversation meant more than the last. I started looking forward to seeing you, hearing your laugh, and spending time with you. Then came our first date—the day I realized that you were becoming someone incredibly special to me.

+ read more
Chapter Three
Falling, Properly

Somewhere between our late talks, our smiles, and all those little moments, I fell in love with you. And when we finally confessed our feelings, it felt like our hearts had been waiting for that moment all along, Loving you became the most beautiful thing I've ever experienced.

+ read more
Chapter Four
Today

Today, I realize that the girl I met in physics class became my favorite person, my greatest blessing, and my favorite story. And if I could live this life again, I would still fall in love with you all over again.

+ read more

One More Thing

A Letter For You

My Mariam,

I wanted to build you something that couldn't fit in a text message or a phone call — something you could open whenever you needed reminding of how I feel.

From the moment I met you, there was something about you that felt different. You have this beautiful way of making ordinary moments feel special, and your smile somehow makes even my worst days better. I admire your kindness, your strength, and the way you care about the people you love. You became my comfort, my happiness, and one of the best things that has ever happened to me.

I don't know what the future holds, but I do know one thing: if I could choose again, I would still choose you. In every lifetime, in every version of my story, I would want you in it.

Thank you for being exactly who you are. I don't say it enough, so I built you a whole page to say it properly.

Forever and Always yours — Mohamed

One Simple Question

Do You Love Me?

I love you too, baby ♡
made with love, for Mariam
A Secret
No matter what problems come between us, I will always love you
